name: Colorado DORA Division of Professions and Occupations Trade License Lookup
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official DORA/DPO lookup before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Colorado DPO electrical, plumbing, and related professional license records exposed by official lookup paths
knownExclusions: Colorado does not have a single statewide general contractor source represented by this entry.
Local contractor licenses, local permits, and non-DORA authorizations are outside this source entry.
Separate DPO boards and programs may require separate source entries before adapter work.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. The official DORA pages should be used for manual source research until access rules and export options are clearer.
publicRecordsNotes: Official lookup source metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license or credential does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: DORA references license lookup paths, but no construction-specific official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Colorado DORA trade-license lookup. Future work should decide whether electrical, plumbing, and other DPO programs need separate entries.
maintainerNotes: Do not describe this as statewide contractor coverage; it is DORA/DPO trade-license metadata.
